title: QualityCraft
description: QualityCraft is a Quality of Life modpack for Minecraft that enhances vanilla gameplay with over 75 mods. Experience improved performance, higher FPS, and beautiful shaders, all while keeping the core essence of Minecraft intact!
body:
## Need a server? Use code JELLE25 for 25% off! (Sponsored)
[![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/xILxbJW.png)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3219)

## QualityCraft - The Ultimate Quality of Life Modpack for Minecraft
**QualityCraft** - The Ultimate Quality of Life Modpack for Minecraft

QualityCraft is for everyone who loves Vanilla Minecraft but wants it to be just a little better! With over 75 carefully selected mods, this modpack offers handy improvements to enhance your gaming experience without changing the core feel of Minecraft. No cheats—just smart mods that boost performance, improve visuals, and make the game more enjoyable.

### Some key mods include:
### 
**Sodium** and **Lithium** for massive performance boosts and smoother gameplay.

**Iris Shaders** with **BSL Shaders**, **Complementary Shaders** - Reimagined/Unbound  for stunning visuals.

**Dynamic FPS** and **Entity Culling** to ensure optimal performance, even on lower-end PCs.

**Xaero's World Map** and Coordinates Display for better navigation.

**Inventory Blur** and **Durability Tooltip** for a more polished interface.

These and many more mods ensure more FPS, smoother performance, shader support, and a beautifully enhanced world without slowing down your gameplay. Everything still feels like Vanilla Minecraft, but with clever improvements that make the game more fun and easier to play.

Here’s a list of each mod in the modpack along with a brief description of what they do. [Mod-list](https://github.com/jelle218/QualityCraft-ModList/tree/main)

Check out our video that showcases how each mod in the QualityCraft modpack enhances your Minecraft experience! [Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Jn6xLAyFRcU)

Play Minecraft the way it’s meant to be, with beautiful graphics, better performance, and handy tweaks—without cheating.

### QualityCraft – Minecraft, but better!
###
